explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in C tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in C tier with an overall score of 53 from a base nutrition score of 50. Context lifted it by 3 points.

closing.summary: Chicken Thigh does have a few real-world upsides. but the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. best only if convenience, budget, or taste matters more than getting the cleanest meat option.
